sentences.jp: 朝、二人は公園にいます。
sentences.en: Morning — the two of us are at the park.
My friend, too, reads a book.

sentences.jp: 友達の本の色はいいです。
sentences.en: The color of the friend's book is nice.

sentences.jp: そして、お茶もあります。
sentences.en: And then, there is also tea.
The two of us read a book together.
